raw_title: Consumer Preferences and Willingness to Pay for Digital Journalism in Intermedia Competition: A Conjoint Analysis of Online News Users in the Austrian Market
title_en: Consumer Preferences and Willingness to Pay for Digital Journalism in Intermedia Competition: A Conjoint Analysis of Online News Users in the Austrian Market
title_zh: 媒介竞争中的消费者偏好与数字新闻付费意愿：奥地利市场在线新闻用户的联合分析
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究调查了奥地利在线新闻用户对数字新闻的偏好和付费意愿。研究人员使用联合分析方法，了解在多种媒介竞争的环境下，用户愿意为哪些新闻特征付费。
plain_summary_en: This study examines Austrian online news users' preferences and willingness to pay for digital journalism. Using conjoint analysis, researchers explore what news features users are willing to pay for in a competitive media environment.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻商业模式与消费者行为研究，关注媒介竞争环境下的付费意愿和用户偏好分析。
research_direction_en: Research on digital journalism business models and consumer behavior, focusing on willingness to pay and user preferences in competitive media environments.
